name: hmventures
description: Shared Claude Code skills for HM Ventures (Howard + Mike).

plugins.name: social-post
plugins.description: Create and publish a social media post from a file or inline content. Picks accounts, fills required fields, confirms it actually went live. woopsocial backend behind a swappable adapter.

plugins.name: content-pipeline
plugins.description: Run the content pipeline end to end: discover candidate topics from a pluggable source (Reddit digest first), review and decide which to pursue, interview and draft an article, take edit rounds, and approve. Learns writing-style rules from edit feedback over time.
